# BABILong leaderboard snapshot

Source: <https://huggingface.co/spaces/RMT-team/babilong/raw/main/data/leaderboard-v0_results.csv>

Retrieved: 2026-05-25

Purpose: reproducible README/documentation charts comparing CSM's committed
BABILong QA1/QA2 4K/8K run against the historical BABILong Space leaderboard on
the overlapping task/length slice, and showing the v0 avg(QA1-QA5) top systems.

Important scope note: this is not a current 2026 frontier-model leaderboard.
CSM has not yet run the full official avg(QA1-QA5) leaderboard. The public CSM
run is 30 rows per cell for QA1/QA2 at 4K/8K, while the leaderboard rows are the
benchmark Space's v0 aggregate entries.
